title: Ponkapoag Boardwalk is closed until further notice
body: DCR has temporarily closed the Ponkapoag Boardwalk in the Blue Hills Reservation.

title: DCR Recreational Advisory: Western Mass Snowmobile Trail Closures
body: Effective immediately for the remainder of the season, or unless snow conditions become acceptable again
